mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_runs (user_id, tickers, model_name, selected_analysts, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tickers}, #{modelName}, #{selectedAnalysts}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_runs SET status = #{status}, analyst_signals = #{analystSignals}, decisions = #{decisions}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM analysis_runs WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analysis_runs WHERE user_id = #{userId}
